description: A social platform where users can share, discover, and rate recipes. Users create profiles to showcase their culinary creations, while others can browse, save, and rate recipes they try. The platform fosters community engagement through recipe ratings, comments, and user interactions.
features: Recipe creation with ingredients, instructions, and photos
Recipe browsing with search and filtering
Social feed showing recent recipes from followed users
Recipe sharing via social media or direct links
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
userFlows: User signs up and creates profile
User creates and publishes a recipe
User rates and reviews a recipe
User saves favorite recipes to personal collection
User follows other users to see their recipes
User comments on recipes to ask questions or give feedback
User shares recipes with friends via social media
User edits or deletes their own recipes
Admin moderates inappropriate content or users
constraints: Must be responsive and work on mobile, tablet, and desktop
Must support image uploads for recipe photos
Must scale to support thousands of users and recipes
Must provide intuitive navigation and user experience
Must include accessibility features for diverse users
